About Me
DHRUV
ADITYA
COPPISETTI
Student Builder Learner 16 yrs

Currently completing senior high school at 16, building a strong academic foundation with a hands-on portfolio rooted in curiosity, discipline, and originality. I value long-term thinking, learning by doing, and turning ideas into real, working systems.

My interests lie in engineering and experimental technology — hardware, electronics, embedded systems, robotics, automation, and AI-driven systems. Alongside this, I explore photography and visual storytelling.

Deeply interested in human psychology and the subconscious — how people think, react, and make decisions. Open to collaboration, learning opportunities, and ambitious projects.
